runners.formComment: Sent out long odds last time but rocketed out of the boxes with a fast early sectional and gave a sight before being swallowed up late, finishing a 1.4 lengths third (22.74) over 390m at Shepparton. Thereabouts and rates well in this. Expected to run well.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Sent out long odds last time but rocketed out of the boxes with a fast early sectional and gave a sight before being swallowed up late, finishing a 1.4 lengths third (22.74) over 390m at Shepparton. Thereabouts and rates well in this. Expected to run well.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Contacted approaching home turn.

runners.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at Ballarat (22.58) in a Grade 4/5, finishing a 4.5 lengths fourth. Goes very well from the draw boasting three victories and five places from 13 starts. Key chance and should go close.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Didn't make the placings last time at Ballarat (22.58) in a Grade 4/5, finishing a 4.5 lengths fourth. Goes very well from the draw boasting three victories and five places from 13 starts. Key chance and should go close.

runners.formComment: Charged out of the boxes with a strong early split and went straight to the front, scoring an all the way win (23.42) over 400m at Warragul. Should be around the mark.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Charged out of the boxes with a strong early split and went straight to the front, scoring an all the way win (23.42) over 400m at Warragul. Should be around the mark.

runners.formComment: Hit the ground running with a slick early sectional but ran over late and missed the frame when a 3 length fourth (23.19) over 400m at Warragul. More than capable and has to be included.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Hit the ground running with a slick early sectional but ran over late and missed the frame when a 3 length fourth (23.19) over 400m at Warragul. More than capable and has to be included.

runners.formComment: Missed the frame latest (25.73) when sixth over 450m at Ballarat in a R/A FIN. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed three times. Suited here and expected to run well.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame latest (25.73) when sixth over 450m at Ballarat in a R/A FIN. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed three times. Suited here and expected to run well.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Raced in home straight.

runners.formComment: Missed the frame latest (22.58) when sixth over 390m at Shepparton in a Grade 5. Goes very well from the draw boasting two places from four starts. Has ability and looks a key chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame latest (22.58) when sixth over 390m at Shepparton in a Grade 5. Goes very well from the draw boasting two places from four starts. Has ability and looks a key chance.

runners.formComment: Last start finished third on April 9 over 390m at this track behind Paw Missy, beaten 5.5 lengths (22.52) in a Grade 5. Hard to have this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished third on April 9 over 390m at this track behind Paw Missy, beaten 5.5 lengths (22.52) in a Grade 5. Hard to have this time.

runners.formComment: Won two starts back at Geelong over 460m in 25.96. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when sixth over 460m at Geelong at Mix 6/7 FIN level. Tempted to look elsewhere.
